ogTitle: Cranebrook vs Crangan Bay: Climate Safety

heading: Cranebrook vs Crangan Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cranebrook, New South Wales and Crangan Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cranebrook has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Crangan Bay (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cranebrook or Crangan Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cranebrook has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Crangan Bay scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cranebrook scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Crangan Bay scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cranebrook or Crangan Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cranebrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
